name: Reset 45
description: A 45-minute introductory scalp reset ritual. Designed for those stepping into Coulisse Heir for the first time — a quiet moment to cleanse, rebalance, and reset both scalp and mind. Performed in a private pod.

name: Reset Glow
description: A 60-minute scalp restoration ritual that cleanses, rebalances, and restores radiance to the scalp. A gentle but effective reset for women who want to begin their scalp wellness journey.

name: SHE Calm
description: A 90-minute bespoke SHE Time ritual designed for women dealing with stress-related scalp concerns. Performed in a private pod, SHE Calm combines targeted scalp therapy with sensory wellness — soft lighting, aromatherapy, and uninterrupted stillness. A ritual that restores both scalp and spirit.

name: SHE Complete
description: Our most comprehensive SHE Time ritual — 100 minutes of full scalp and hair restoration in a private pod. Bespoke to your scalp's needs, SHE Complete is the ultimate investment in yourself. For women who are ready to fully reset, restore, and reconnect with their sense of calm.

name: ScalpTox
description: A 60-minute scalp detox and rebalancing ritual. Deeply purifies the scalp environment, removes buildup, and restores the natural balance disrupted by stress, product use, or environmental factors. A clean slate for your scalp.

name: ScalpEase
description: A 75-minute soothing ritual for sensitive, irritated, or reactive scalps. Gently restores equilibrium with calming actives — ideal for women whose scalp conditions are aggravated by stress, lifestyle, or environmental changes.

name: EXO Root
description: A 90-minute advanced exosome therapy ritual targeting hair root strengthening and density restoration. Science-backed cellular treatment for women experiencing thinning hair or early-stage hair loss. Performed with precision in a private, calm setting.

name: EXO Glow
description: A 90-minute premium exosome ritual for scalp vitality and luminous hair health. Targets cellular renewal at the follicle level, restoring the scalp's natural energy and the hair's inherent glow. The most transformative treatment in our Empower collection.

name: Engenerate
description: A 90-minute energising scalp ritual designed to awaken dormant follicles and stimulate natural hair regrowth. Combines advanced scalp science with a deeply restorative experience — because rebuilding confidence begins from within.
